regions.text: Nitrogen, carbon, oxygen, and hydrogen are used over and over again. Plants build them up; animals eat plants; waste and dead plants are broken down again.
The great round goes on without end, made possible by solar energy. Oxygen and carbon dioxide in the air are there because of photosynthesis.
fallen: leaves which fell from trees. FUTURE: will fall. PRESENT: fall(s). PAST: fell, fallen.
